name: Integration test: consent-gated route asserts status only, no body
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-06] only asserts res.status 200 after a CONSENTED parent requests child's learner profile; a route returning {} or wrong profile would pass. Fix: assert body.id matches childProfileId.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the consented parent-child learner-profile integration test only asserts HTTP 200, so an empty body or wrong profile body would pass. Variants: CONSENTED child request must assert response body.id equals childProfileId; PENDING/DENIED child consent failures must continue to assert 403. Regression test: tests/integration/learner-profile-child-consent.integration.test.ts fails if GET /v1/learner-profile/:childId returns 200 with the wrong profile or empty body, and passes when the body assertion is added.
